author: gionzi
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Aggregates all incomplete tasks from the vault into a monthly timeline view with in-place date editing and write-back to source notes.

manifest.author: gionzi
manifest.description: Aggregates all incomplete tasks from the vault into a monthly timeline view with in-place date editing and write-back to source notes.
manifest.name: Vault Task Planner

name: Vault Task Planner

releases.author: giacomoleonzi
releases.description: Maintenance release addressing Obsidian community plugin review guidelines: removed the builtin-modules dependency, switched the scanner to cachedRead, replaced as-any casts with typed APIs and MarkdownView checks, and sentence-cased UI labels. No functional changes.

releases.author: giacomoleonzi
releases.description: First public release of Vault Task Planner. Aggregates incomplete vault tasks into a monthly timeline with inline date editing and write-back to source notes.
